mapper.select: select id, table_name, field_key, field_label, field_type, field_options, is_required, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from proj_field_def where table_name = #{tableName} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order

select id, table_name, field_key, field_label, field_type, field_options, is_required, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from proj_field_def where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
update proj_field_def set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
